summary: Large visual-effects decomp cleanup and matching pass. The PR renamed efSpecial to efAlt, introduced efdata.c as the owner for effect static data, updated splits/symbols/configure for the new object layout, improved efSync/efAsync matching, made efAsync_Spawn match, matched .sdata for efsync.c and efasync.c, and replaced many address-based efLib/efAsync symbols with descriptive names. Evidence for reviewer intent is limited: there were no review comments, and the only recorded discussion says a reported issue was jumptable-related and expected to disappear once the associated function matches.

key_files.role: Major efAsync rewrite/cleanup; efAsync_Spawn now matches and efAsync_Dispatch was slightly improved; many raw Effect field uses became EF_Effect fields and EF_STATE_ASYNC.
Large efLib cleanup with descriptive function names and effect helper behavior exposed through named symbols.
efSync_Spawn slightly better match; .sdata now matches according to PR body.
New replacement for efspecial.c; contains efAlt_Spawn and uses EFALT_VA_ARG for typed varargs access.
Removed as part of efSpecial -> efAlt rename.
New file for ef static data moved from eflib_alloc and other data regions.
Effect type/header cleanup supporting named EF_Effect, EF_DAT_Entry, queued effect, spawn/load/state concepts.
Header updates for newly named efLib APIs and globals.
Object layout updated from eflib_alloc.c to efdata.c and from efspecial.c to efalt.c; .sdata/.sbss boundaries adjusted.
Renamed many efLib, efAsync, efAlt, data, bss, sbss, sdata2 symbols from address names to descriptive names.
Build object list changed to compile efdata.c and efalt.c in the ef visual effects library.
Added float and long precision math constants such as M_PI_F, M_PI_2_F, M_PI_L, M_TAU_L.

what_changed: Renamed the effect special module from efSpecial/efspecial.c/efspecial.h to efAlt/efalt.c/efalt.h. The PR body says this was because the work started after a previous efSpecial change.
Created src/melee/ef/efdata.c and efdata.h for ef static data, replacing the old eflib_alloc object in config/GALE01/splits.txt and configure.py.
Deleted eflib_alloc.h and removed eflib_alloc.c content while moving its data ownership into efdata.c.
Adjusted GALE01 split boundaries: efdata.c gained .bss and .sbss, eflib.c no longer owns the ef sbss range, and efsync.c/efasync.c .sdata end addresses were tightened.

Renamed many effect functions in symbols.txt, including efLib_Init, efLib_SetFlags, efLib_Destroy, efLib_Create, efLib_Create_Attach, efLib_CreateGenerator, efLib_SpawnParticleEffect, efAsync_Dispatch, efAsync_LoadAsync, efAsync_OnLoad, efAsync_LoadSync, efAsync_QueueProcessDeferred, efAsync_QueueFlush, efAsync_QueueClear, efAsync_QueueInit, and efAlt_Spawn.
Renamed effect data/global symbols such as efAsync_DatEntries, efLib_AnimQueue, efLib_ParamTable, efLib_LoadKind, efLib_EffectCount, and efLib_AnimCount.
Converted many raw Effect field names/usages in efasync.c to EF_Effect fields such as state_flags, scale_flags, update, lifetime, params, and next.
Introduced or used clearer EF constants/enums such as EF_LOADKIND_SYNC, EF_STATE_ASYNC, EF_SCALE_INHERIT, and EF_SPAWN_* cases for deferred async queue processing.
Added MSL math constants with explicit float and long suffixes: M_PI_F, M_PI_2_F, M_PI_3_F, M_PI_L, M_TAU_L, M_PI_2_L, and M_PI_3_L.
Updated dependent fighter, item, game-mode, stage, baselib particle/gobj, and library call sites for renamed effect APIs/headers.
smart_moves: Separated static effect data into efdata.c instead of keeping it in an allocation-named object, which made split ownership clearer and allowed ef .sbss layout to match the intended object boundaries.
Renamed address-only symbols in a broad, systematic pass, making later matching work easier to search and reason about without changing every function to fully matched C.
Kept efsync.c and efasync.c as NonMatching in configure.py while still improving local matches, avoiding overclaiming match status for entire objects.
Used descriptive EF_Effect field names and EF_SPAWN_* switch labels in efAsync queue code, turning magic offsets and integer cases into reusable structural knowledge.
Tracked data-section matching explicitly in splits.txt and symbols.txt, including .sdata, .sbss, .sdata2, jumptable, and DAT-entry symbols.
Added precision-specific math constants instead of relying on ambiguous double constants when float/long literal typing matters for matching.
decomp_lessons: When static data is blocking matching, consider whether the object file boundary is wrong; moving data to a dedicated object can fix .bss/.sbss ownership and simplify splits.
Address-name-to-descriptive-name passes are valuable even before full function matching, especially for large dispatcher modules like efAsync_Dispatch and efAlt_Spawn.
Do not promote an object to Matching just because individual functions or data sections match; this PR left efsync.c and efasync.c NonMatching while documenting specific wins.
For varargs-heavy effect spawners, typed helper macros like EFALT_VA_ARG can make argument access explicit and may help reproduce compiler behavior.
Use named state/load/spawn constants to preserve semantic discoveries: EF_LOADKIND_SYNC, EF_STATE_ASYNC, EF_SCALE_INHERIT, and EF_SPAWN_* make later call-site audits easier.

Jumptable diffs may be symptoms of the containing function not matching yet; the PR discussion explicitly says a jumptable-related issue should be inherently fixed once the associated function matches.
naming_conventions: Effect library functions use the efLib_ prefix, with descriptive verbs/nouns such as efLib_Init, efLib_Create, efLib_Create_Attach, efLib_CreateGenerator, efLib_SpawnParticleEffect, efLib_SetParamAlpha, and efLib_SetParamGfxId.
Callback helpers use efLib_Cb_ prefixes, for example efLib_Cb_SetScale_FromParamX, efLib_Cb_SetRotY_FromFighterDir, efLib_Cb_Fall_FromParamY, and efLib_Cb_ApplyStoredAlpha.

Async effect functions use efAsync_ prefixes and queue/load verbs: efAsync_Dispatch, efAsync_LoadAsync, efAsync_OnLoad, efAsync_LoadSync, efAsync_QueueProcessDeferred, efAsync_QueueFlush, efAsync_QueueClear, efAsync_QueueInit.
The former efSpecial module became efAlt, with the main symbol efAlt_Spawn and data labels prefixed efAlt_.
Effect globals use efLib_ names that encode purpose, e.g. efLib_LoadKind, efLib_EffectCount, efLib_AnimCount, efLib_AnimQueue, efLib_ParamTable.
Effect types/constants use EF_ uppercase prefixes for semantic constants and structs, including EF_Effect, EF_DAT_Entry, EF_LOADKIND_SYNC, EF_STATE_ASYNC, EF_SCALE_INHERIT, and EF_SPAWN_*.

The PR contains a few mixed-case/lowercase names such as efLib_remove_user_data, efLib_render_callback, efLib_particles_proc_main, and efLib_particles_proc_aux; the author explicitly said they were not attached to the descriptive names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Adjusted object split ranges for .sdata and .sbss to reflect new data ownership: efdata.c owns ef .sbss at 0x804D64E8-0x804D64F4, and eflib.c no longer owns that range.
Tightened efsync.c .sdata from end 0x804D39D8 to 0x804D39D5 and efasync.c .sdata from end 0x804D3A00 to 0x804D39FA, matching the PR body's claim that those .sdata sections now match.
Renamed local data and jump table symbols for efAlt and efAsync, including jumptable_803BF9F8, jumptable_803BFB28, and efAsync_DatEntries.
Used explicit float/long math constants in MSL math.h, likely to help literal type/codegen consistency where M_PI-derived values appear in matching code.
In efAlt_Spawn, EFALT_VA_ARG wraps __va_arg with _var_arg_typeof for typed vararg extraction, a targeted tactic for varargs dispatcher matching.
The diff includes PAD_STACK(80) in efAlt_Spawn and a comment around an efLib_AnimQueue cast, indicating stack/layout-sensitive matching work rather than purely cosmetic cleanup.
The only discussion comment identifies a remaining issue as jumptable-related and expected to resolve when the associated function matches.

review_feedback.feedback: A reported visual/diff issue was described by the author as jumptable-related and expected to be inherently fixed once the associated function matches.
review_feedback.evidence_strength: direct but low context; the screenshot content is not available in text

review_feedback.feedback: The author invited future renaming changes: 'Feel free to change any of these, I am not attached to them.'
No review comments were present in the provided slice.
review_feedback.evidence_strength: direct from counts and empty review_comments_excerpt

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that revisit or rename efAlt_Spawn or the efAlt module.
Find later PRs that make efAsync_Dispatch or efSync_Spawn fully matching after this 'slightly better match' PR.
Search for uses of EFALT_VA_ARG to see whether the varargs tactic was retained or generalized.
Search later symbols for efLib_remove_user_data and other mixed-case names to see whether naming was normalized.
Find PRs involving jumptable_803BF9F8 or jumptable_803BFB28 to track whether the jumptable issue mentioned in comments was resolved.
Search for efdata.c ownership changes to confirm whether effect static data stayed separated from eflib_alloc.
